titleStmt.title: SII 16.129: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 129. (A.R. No. 690 of 1917.) KŌVELAKUṆṬLA, KOILKUNTLA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Aṅkāḷamma temple.
This is dated Śaka 1465, Śōbhakṛit, Nija-Śrāvaṇa ba. 10., corresponding to 1543 A.D., August 25, (Saturday).

It registers the grant of income derived from svāmyatas in his nāyaṅkara territory of Kōvilakuṇṭla-sīma for the cheṟapu (śiṟappu) and pāruvēṇṭa festivals of the goddess Ahaṅkāḷamma by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandyāla Avubhaḷēsvaradēva Mahārāju, son of Siṅgarayyadēva Mahārāju and the grandson of Narasiṅgayyadēva Mahārāju of the lunar race and Ātrēya-gōtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavaruṣaṁbbulu 1465 A
gu nēṭi śōbhakṛttu saṁvatsara
nijaśrāvaṇa ba 10 lu śrīmaNma
hārājādhirāja rājaparamē
śvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī sadāsi
vadēvarāyamahārāyalu vi
jaya nagaramaṁddu vaṅrēsiṁhvāsa
nāsīnuṁḍai pṛthvīrājyaṁ cēyucu
ṁḍḍagānu Ātrēyagōtrōdbhavulai
na sōmakulavaṁśōdbhavulaina śrī
manmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara naṁdyēla narasi
ṁggayya dēva mahārājuluṁgāri
pautṛuluṁnnu . siṁggarayya dēva
mahārājulugāri putṛulaina
Avubhaḷēsvaradēva mahārājulu
gāru māku sadāsivadēvamahā
rāyalugāru māku nāyaṁka
rānaku pāliṁcca navadhariṁccina
kōvilakuṁṭla sīmalōnu mahā
rācaprayōjanālkuṁ naḍacē A
saṁkhyādulakuṁnnu Iccina dharma
śāsanaṁ Ā dēvuniki cēśē pra
yōjanāla valanavaccē svāmyatala gutta
mānitimi Aṁdukuvaccē svāmya
talu Ahaṁkāḷaṁmaku cerapu

pā� Amṛ
tapaḷakuṁnnuṁ prathamayēkādaTheanusvāra, engraved below the line, is redundant.
si puṇyakālaṁmaṁddu dhāravō
si Istimi ĀcaṁdrārkkasthāIgānu
Iccina dharmaśāsanaṁ I dharmānaku
yavvuru tappi naḍacinānu tama
tallitaṁḍrādulanu vāraṇāsilō
nu vadhiyiṁccina pāpāna pōdu
ru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānu pālanaṁ . para
dattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpha
laṁ bhavēttu . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.129 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
